title: Did EOE Take place in 2016
wikitext:
[]: Did EOE Take place in 2016?             Quote Post by MitsumuraKun51196 » Wed Aug 05, 2015 12:25 am Here's an intresting look at things Asuka is already 14 in the series right? that must mean the series must of started somewhere between december 2015 or january 2016 so end of evangelion must of taken place somewhere between june and july 2016, please give me some insight on this.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Aug 05, 2015 12:59 am EoE has one scene in which a graphic of Anti-AT field activity from 2nd Impact is compared with what's going on outside right then and there -- only that one is captioned 2015 (rather that "Present Day, Present Time"). Episode 26 says 2016, which is the only other date quoted. This leaves the concurrency minded to put EoE starting on New Year's Eve.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Aug 05, 2015 8:17 pm Pretty much what Tines said. Other than that, we don't really have much to go by. Unless supplemental materials state something I'm not aware of?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Aug 06, 2015 5:17 pm The date in the classroom? Misato's calendar? Or do those just give month and day?

[]: Re: Did EOE Take place in 2016?             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Aug 14, 2015 1:51 pm MitsumuraKun51196 wrote: Here's an intresting look at things Asuka is already 14 in the series right? that must mean the series must of started somewhere between december 2015 or january 2016 so end of evangelion must of taken place somewhere between june and july 2016, please give me some insight on this.

[]:             Quote Post by PurpleandRed » Sun Aug 23, 2015 8:39 am I didn't pay attention to this, but I read somewhere that it couldn't have occurred no later than December 30th, 2015.
